title: Lewis Hamilton surprises Mercedes as Oscar Piastri ‘astonished’ by FIA decision
summary:
Lewis Hamilton was the surprise package in qualifying for the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix as the seven-time world champion split the Mercedes duo. George Russell bounced back to claim pole, while Kimi Antonelli had to settle for third.

Elsewhere, the FIA handing Pierre Gasly back his Monaco podium continued to be a major talking point, with McLaren's Oscar Piastri revealing that he was "astonished" by the decision that was made.

Join RacingNews365's Nick Golding and Samuel Coop as they dissect Barcelona GP qualifying!

High tyre degradation at the Formula 1 Barcelona Grand Prix will create small differences between the three compounds and considerable strategic variation during Sunday's race, according to pole winner George Russell.
